summary: Testing CGR Bank application after syntax fix. Backend fully operational. Fixed critical bug: /api/sync/manual (Synchroniser button) was returning null response due to misplaced return statement inside migrate_to_organization function. All 3 owner logins working, dashboard displays stats, banks page accessible with import button, monthly report page functional. All 19 backend tests pass.

minor.issue: FIXED: Was returning null body. Return statement was accidentally placed inside migrate_to_organization() instead of manual_sync(). Fixed by adding return statement back to manual_sync() and removing orphaned return from migrate_to_organization().

Returns 404 - endpoint does not exist. Review request incorrectly listed this endpoint. The Dashboard 'Synchroniser' button correctly calls /api/sync/manual (confirmed in api.js). Not a real user-facing issue.

action_items: Code review note: scheduled_sync_and_match() function uses user_id-based filter (not organization_id filter) - could miss tenants/transactions for shared organization members. Consider updating to use org filter.
Minor UX: sync success message may start with ', ' if notion_sync succeeds but appears first in concat - e.g. ', 0 transactions' if notion_sync is false but bank_sync is true (edge case)
The /api/payments/monthly-status endpoint requires `month` (int) and `year` (int) query params - ensure Monthly Report page passes them correctly
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: manual_sync() at line 2070 had no return statement - return was placed inside migrate_to_organization(). Dashboard's handleManualSync() would crash accessing null.results

scheduled_sync_and_match() uses user_id filter only (not org filter), may not sync correctly for org members who are not the original data owner. Low priority since it's a scheduled task and manual sync works.
The manual_sync() function calls auto_match_transactions(current_user) directly (bypassing FastAPI DI) - works but unconventional pattern.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load, all 3 owners login, sync button works, banks/monthly report accessible)

seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Existing production data used (52 tenants, 1 LCL bank, 2 connected LCL accounts via Open Banking)
context_for_next_testing_agent: CGR Bank is a rental management app for 3 co-owners sharing data via organization_id. Backend was fixed (syntax error in scheduled_sync_and_match). Critical bug found and fixed: manual_sync() had no return statement causing null responses. All APIs working. Key endpoints: /api/auth/login, /api/dashboard/stats, /api/banks, /api/payments/stats-by-structure, /api/sync/manual, /api/banking/import-all. App in French. Production data: 52 tenants, 17 paid (dashboard) / 16 paid (monthly report - different period calculation), 1 LCL bank (10,992.09€). All 3 owner accounts work with shared org data.

rca_of_bug.root_cause: During a code edit, the return statement `return {'message': 'Synchronisation manuelle terminée', 'results': results}` was accidentally moved from the end of manual_sync() (line ~2130) into the migrate_to_organization() function body (lines 2229-2232). This made manual_sync() have no return statement, causing FastAPI to return null JSON body on 200 OK response.
rca_of_bug.impact: Dashboard 'Synchroniser' button would silently fail - handleManualSync() tried to access response.data.results on null, throwing a JS error caught by the try/catch, showing 'Erreur lors de la synchronisation' toast to the user.
rca_of_bug.fix: Added return statement to end of manual_sync() and removed orphaned return from migrate_to_organization(). Verified with backend test and direct curl - now returns {message: ..., results: {notion_sync, bank_sync, matching}} properly.
rca_of_bug.reproduction: POST /api/sync/manual with valid auth token - before fix: returned null, after fix: returns {message: 'Synchronisation manuelle terminée', results: {notion_sync: {success: true, count: 52}, bank_sync: {success: true, count: 0}, matching: {success: true, count: 0}}}
